items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has more ways to win the fight than Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: I just think he's got way more ways to win.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is currently in the best form of his career.
items.quote: he's in the form of his career.

items.claim: The matchup between Benoit Saint Denis and Paddy Pimblett is a bad stylistic matchup for Pimblett.
items.quote: it is a pretty bad match up for Patty.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has been inactive for five years.
items.quote: Conor McGregor back in the octagon for the first time in six years

items.claim: 170 pounds is not a natural weight class for Max Holloway.
items.quote: 170 is not a natural weight class of Max Holloway.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has been walking around at 185 pounds for the last five years.
items.quote: McGregor has been walking around at like 185 for 5 years now.

items.claim: Max Holloway is one of the best strikers currently in the UFC.
items.quote: He's one of the best strikers in the UFC right now.
